# vector: hello_resp
# HELLO_RESP：版本、build_hash、固件名、tick_hz 与能力位
# raw  = COBS 编码前帧 (ver|type|flags|seq|len|payload|crc32c, 全 LE)
# wire = COBS(raw) + 0x00 定界符（SCI 链路实际字节）
raw: 5281000100240002000400ebb6cc080a00000076696577657232303030000000000000204e00007f000000ee475bf1
wire: 035281020102240202020406ebb6cc080a01010b76696577657232303030010101010103204e01027f010105ee475bf100
